# Stairs are SE - need to go E then S

# First, let me check the immediate area around player on the map
map_text = obs.split('--- MAP ---')[1].split('--- STATUS ---')[0]
map_lines = map_text.strip().split('\n')

player_x, player_y = 58, 3
stairs_x, stairs_y = 70, 11

# Look at the path to stairs
print(f"Current player pos on map: ({player_x}, {player_y})")
print(f"Stairs pos on map: ({stairs_x}, {stairs_y})")

# Check tiles in the eastern direction from player
for dx in range(0, 15):
    if player_x + dx < len(map_lines[0]):
        tile = map_lines[player_y][player_x + dx]
        print(f"East +{dx}: '{tile}'", end=" ")
        if tile == '#':
            print("(wall)")
            break
        print()

# Check the southern area  
for dy in range(0, 10):
    if player_y + dy < len(map_lines):
        tiles = ""
        for dx in range(0, 15):
            if player_x + dx < len(map_lines[0]):
                tiles += map_lines[player_y + dy][player_x + dx]
        print(f"South +{dy}: {tiles}")
